lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸਤਰੀ ਪੁਰਖ ਕਾਮਿ ਵਿਆਪੇ ਜੀਉ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਬਿਧਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: eisataree purakh kaam viaape jeeo raam naam kee bidh nahee jaanee |
lines.english: Men and women are obsessed with sex; they do not know the Way of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਭਾਈ ਖਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਜੀਉ ਡੂਬਿ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa sut bhaaee khare piaare jeeo ddoob mue bin paanee |
lines.english: Mother, father, children and siblings are very dear, but they drown, even without water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੂਬਿ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਗਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਧਾਤੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: ddoob mue bin paanee gat nahee jaanee haumai dhaat sansaare |
lines.english: They are drowned to death without water - they do not know the path of salvation, and they wander around the world in egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਆਇਆ ਸੋ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਜਾਸੀ ਉਬਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo aaeaa so sabh ko jaasee ubare gur veechaare |
lines.english: All those who come into the world shall depart. Only those who contemplate the Guru shall be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਆਪਿ ਤਰੈ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai raam naam vakhaanai aap tarai kul taare |
lines.english: Those who become Gurmukh and chant the Lord's Name, save themselves and save their families as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasai ghatt antar guramat mile piaare |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides deep within their hearts; through the Guru's Teachings, they meet their Beloved. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਕੋ ਥਿਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਜੀਉ ਬਾਜੀ ਹੈ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam bin ko thir naahee jeeo baajee hai sansaaraa |
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, nothing is stable. This world is just a drama.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam vaapaaraa agam apaaraa guramatee dhan paaeeai |
lines.english: Trade in the Lord's Name is infinite and unfathomable. Through the Guru's Teachings, this wealth is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਚੀ ਜੀਉ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: drirr bhagat sachee jeeo raam naam vaapaaraa |
lines.english: Implant true devotional worship within your heart, and trade in the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਮਤਿ ਹੀਣ ਮੂਰਖ ਮੁਗਧ ਅੰਧੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ham mat heen moorakh mugadh andhe satigur maarag paae |
lines.english: I am senseless, foolish, idiotic and blind, but the True Guru has placed me on the Path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਾ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਇਹ ਸਾਚੀ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sevaa surat bhagat ih saachee vichahu aap gavaaeeai |
lines.english: This selfless service, meditation and devotion is true, if you eliminate selfishness and conceit from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰੇ ਆਪਿ ਜੀਉ ਆਪੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aap karaae kare aap jeeo aape sabad savaare |
lines.english: He Himself acts, and inspires others to act; He Himself embellishes us with the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh sabad suhaave anadin har gun gaae |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs are adorned with the Shabad; night and day, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਆਪਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਜੀਉ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਭਗਤ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape satigur aap sabad jeeo jug jug bhagat piaare |
lines.english: He Himself is the True Guru, and He Himself is the Shabad; in each and every age, He loves His devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦਾਨਾ ਆਪੇ ਬੀਨਾ ਆਪੇ ਸੇਵ ਕਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape daanaa aape beenaa aape sev karaae |
lines.english: He Himself is All-knowing, and He Himself is All-seeing; He inspires us to serve Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਭਗਤ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ਆਪੇ ਭਗਤੀ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jug jug bhagat piaare har aap savaare aape bhagatee laae |
lines.english: In age after age, He loves His devotees; the Lord Himself adorns them, and He Himself enjoins them to worship Him with devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਸਚੇ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak sad balihaaree sache vittahu aape kare karaae |4|4|
lines.english: Nanak is forever a sacrifice to the True Lord, who Himself is the Doer, the Cause of causes. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਕਾਟੇ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape gunadaataa avagun kaatte hiradai naam vasaae |
lines.english: He Himself is the Giver of merits, and the Destroyer of demerits; He causes His Name to dwell within our hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Gauree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਞਹੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਹਿ ਪਿਰਾ ਜੀਉ ਘਰਿ ਬੈਠਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: manyahu door na jaeh piraa jeeo ghar baitthiaa har paae |
lines.english: Do not leave me, O my dear soul - you shall find the Lord while sitting within the home of your own being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਿ ਪਿਰਾ ਜੀਉ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee sevaa kar piraa jeeo har naam dhiaae |
lines.english: Serve the Guru, O my dear soul; meditate on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਬੈਠਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਏ ਸਦਾ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਤਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ghar baitthiaa har paae sadaa chit laae sahaje sat subhaae |
lines.english: You shall obtain the Lord while sitting within the home of your own being, focusing your consciousness constantly upon the Lord, with true intuitive faith.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਖਰੀ ਸੁਖਾਲੀ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee sevaa kharee sukhaalee jis no aap karaae |
lines.english: Serving the Guru brings great peace; they alone do it, whom the Lord inspires to do so.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੋ ਬੀਜੇ ਨਾਮੋ ਜੰਮੈ ਨਾਮੋ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naamo beeje naamo jamai naamo man vasaae |
lines.english: They plant the seed of the Name, and the Name sprouts within; the Name abides within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਪਿਰਾ ਜੀਉ ਜਾ ਚਾਖਹਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam meetthaa piraa jeeo jaa chaakheh chit laae |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is so sweet, O my dear; taste it, and focus your consciousness on it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sach naam vaddiaaee poorab likhiaa paae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, glorious greatness rests in the True Name; It is obtained by perfect pre-ordained destiny. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖੁ ਮੁਯੇ ਜੀਉ ਅਨ ਰਸ ਸਾਦ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa har ras chaakh muye jeeo an ras saad gavaae |
lines.english: Taste the sublime essence of the Lord with your tongue, my dear, and renounce the pleasures of other tastes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਏ ਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਏ ਰਸਨਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa har ras paae jaa har bhaae rasanaa sabad suhaae |
lines.english: You shall obtain the everlasting essence of the Lord when it pleases the Lord; your tongue shall be adorned with the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਉਪਜੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naame upajai naame binasai naame sach samaae |
lines.english: From the Naam we originate, and into the Naam we shall pass; through the Naam, we are absorbed in the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaae sadaa sukh paae naam rahai liv laae |
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, a lasting peace is obtained; so remain lovingly focused on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਵਿਡਾਣੀ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਪਿਰਾ ਜੀਉ ਧਨ ਛੋਡਿ ਪਰਦੇਸਿ ਸਿਧਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eeh viddaanee chaakaree piraa jeeo dhan chhodd parades sidhaae |
lines.english: Working for someone else, O my dear, is like forsaking the bride, and going to foreign countries.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਲਵਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam guramatee paaeeai aape le lavaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam is obtained through the Guru's Teachings; He Himself attaches us to it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਕਿਨੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਪਿਰਾ ਜੀਉ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਲੋਭਿ ਲੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: doojai kinai sukh na paaeo piraa jeeo bikhiaa lobh lubhaae |
lines.english: In duality, no one has ever found peace, O my dear; you are greedy for corruption and greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਿਆ ਲੋਭਿ ਲੁਭਾਏ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਓਹੁ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bikhiaa lobh lubhaae bharam bhulaae ohu kiau kar sukh paae |
lines.english: Greedy for corruption and greed, and deluded by doubt, how can anyone find peace?

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਕਰੀ ਵਿਡਾਣੀ ਖਰੀ ਦੁਖਾਲੀ ਆਪੁ ਵੇਚਿ ਧਰਮੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: chaakaree viddaanee kharee dukhaalee aap vech dharam gavaae |
lines.english: Working for strangers is very painful; doing so, one sells himself and loses his faith in the Dharma.
